mapper.select:
select a.id, train_name, train_sdate, train_edate, host, person_num, learning_content, contact, phone, status, if(enroll_status is null, null, (if(enroll_status = 1, 2, 1))) signStatus from xm_project_terminal_train a left join xm_project_terminal_train_sign b on a.id = b.train_id and b.person_id = #{personId} and b.is_delete = 0 where a.is_delete = 0 and a.status > 1 and exists(select 1 from xm_person p left join sys_org o on p.org_id = o.id where (o.pids like concat('%[', a.org_id, ']%') or p.org_id = a.org_id) and p.id = #{personId})
and a.train_name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and a.status = #{status}
order by enroll_status desc
select count(1) from xm_project_terminal_train_sign a where is_delete = 0 and enroll_status = 1 and train_id = #{trainId}
SELECT id, train_name, train_sdate, train_edate, train_address, learning_content, status, person_num, contact, phone FROM xm_project_terminal_train WHERE is_delete = 0 and id = #{trainId}
